rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution includes a structured review of JMR 1998–2003 articles and tabulation of econometric diagnostics, and the cited paper is a 2002 JMR empirical econometric study squarely within that review window. Given this fit (and the cited paper’s explicit treatment of price endogeneity/joint demand-pricing estimation), the citation is plausibly part of substantive methodological discussion rather than an obvious incidental mention.
